chat.telegram.bot_token.desc: Your Telegram Bot Token. If you don't have one, you can get it from @BotFather.
chat.telegram.collapse_length.desc: The message length threshold above which the message will be collapsed into an expandable quote.
chat.telegram.reaction_status.desc:
Emoji reaction notification preference.
- enabled: an emoji reaction is added to your message while processing.
- clean: the reaction is removed after the model finishes processing.
- disabled: no emoji reaction.
